hero.role: Sales Engineer | Technical Business Executive | Enterprise B2B Value Strategy
hero.subtitle: I bridge the gap between tech and sales to drive business value in complex buying decisions
hero.description: I work as a *Sales Engineer* with *12 years* in Enterprise Software (SaaS), turning deep technical requirements into compelling value propositions that move B2B opportunities forward. I lead technical discovery, shape high-impact solution demos, and de-risk enterprise decisions with clear architecture and outcome mapping. By connecting product depth with commercial priorities, I help revenue teams build trust faster and close strategic accounts with confidence.

seo.title: Juliano Conzatti | Sales Engineer
seo.description: Sales Engineer with 12 years in enterprise software. I bridge the gap between tech and sales to drive business value, reduce complexity, and accelerate B2B deal cycles.

cookieBanner.title: Choose how this portfolio uses cookies and analytics
cookieBanner.description: We use essential browser storage to remember language, theme, and your consent choice. With your authorization, we enable Vercel Analytics and Google Analytics to measure performance, stability, and B2B navigation patterns.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.summary: This page explains, in clear language, how this corporate portfolio handles information when you browse the website, access content, and use the contact channels made available by Juliano Conzatti.
privacyPolicy.currentScopeBody: Today, the website uses browser local storage to remember language and theme, enables Vercel Analytics and Google Analytics only after consent, and relies on hosting, CMS, and external contact providers to operate. If future features such as native forms, newsletters, authenticated areas, interactive automations, or additional measurement integrations are introduced, this policy will be updated before any expansion of data processing, including the relevant categories, purposes, retention, and controls.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
paragraphs: This website is a professional and institutional portfolio. Its purpose is to present Juliano Conzatti's background, content, projects, initiatives, and contact paths in a B2B context.

Privacy is treated as part of product quality. For that reason, this policy aims to explain objectively which data may be processed, why that happens, and which choices are available to you as a data subject, in alignment with the LGPD and international references such as the GDPR and CCPA where relevant.

At this stage, the website does not require user registration for public navigation and does not rely on sensitive data to deliver its core experience. The operating principle is minimization: only process what is necessary for website operation, security, consent-based analytics, and continuity of professional conversations.

sections.title: 2. Data collected automatically
paragraphs: When you access this website, some technical data may be processed automatically to allow the application to load, protect the infrastructure, adapt the interface to your device, and measure service performance.

Not all browser storage serves the same function. Essential preferences such as language, theme, and the consent choice recorded in the cookie banner may be stored locally to support basic personalization and continuity of use, while optional analytics are only activated when you choose to allow that processing.

Authorized analytics tools may collect navigation events, visited pages, interactions, traffic origin, aggregated device information, and performance indicators for continuous improvement, operational stability, and understanding how the portfolio is used.
bullets: IP address and basic connection metadata normally handled by hosting, content delivery, and security services.
Browser type and version, operating system, preferred language, and technical device characteristics used for compatibility, diagnostics, and responsive behavior.
Aggregated measurements of performance, availability, and stability generated by Vercel Analytics only when you authorize that processing.
Navigation events and metrics processed by Google Analytics (GA4), when authorized, to understand traffic, usage behavior, and navigation journeys at an aggregated level.
Strictly technical cookies and equivalent resources required for the essential functioning of the website; non-essential cookies and analytics identifiers only after explicit consent.
Data stored in local storage to remember language, visual theme, and the preference recorded in the cookie banner, without use for the website's own advertising profiling.

sections.title: 3. Use of APIs and third-party services
paragraphs: This website depends on external infrastructure and services for hosting, content delivery, analytics, and content publishing. That includes, for example, providers such as Vercel for deployment and authorized technical measurements, Google Analytics for traffic analytics after consent, and Sanity for blog content delivery.

When you use a contact channel linked from the website, the conversation may continue through external platforms appropriate for professional follow-up. In those cases, some connection metadata and any information you decide to share may also be processed according to the workflows and privacy terms of the relevant provider.

This portfolio uses those services to present content, monitor application health, understand interest in pages, and respond to professional inquiries, but it does not fully control the availability, retention, security, or processing practices adopted by each third party.

sections.title: 4. How data is protected
paragraphs: Reasonable technical and organizational measures are adopted to reduce risk, including HTTPS, limiting unnecessary data exposure, reviewing integrations, and activating non-essential tools only after consent.

The website also seeks to apply the principle of minimization in product decisions: process only what is necessary for the functionality offered, without turning the portfolio into an excessive data collection environment.

No internet-connected environment is entirely risk free. Monitoring, dependency updates, configuration adjustments, and integration reviews may therefore be carried out continuously to reduce operational exposure.

If future features begin to require a proprietary database, authentication, newsletters, internal persistent forms, or relationship automation, controls compatible with that higher level of processing should be implemented before expanding the use of data.

sections.title: 5. Your rights
paragraphs: Under the LGPD and, where applicable, other data protection frameworks, you may request information about the processing of your personal data whenever that processing exists in an identifiable way within this context.
Requests will be assessed reasonably, taking into account legal obligations, technical limitations, security needs, and the nature of the data actually processed by the service in each feature.
bullets: Confirm whether processing exists and request access to personal data related to you, when applicable.
Request correction of incomplete, inaccurate, or outdated data.
Request anonymization, blocking, or deletion of unnecessary, excessive, or unlawfully processed data where applicable.
Obtain information about sharing with third parties and the legal or operational grounds that support processing.
Withdraw consent or object to processing in cases where the law allows that path.

sections.title: 6. Policy changes and contact
paragraphs: This policy may be updated to reflect legal, technical, operational, or product changes. When that happens, the revised version will be published on this page together with the relevant review date.

If a change materially affects the way personal data is handled, the intent is to provide additional transparency before the change is put into practice, especially when new integrations, analytics sources, or persistent relationship features are introduced.

For questions, requests, or the exercise of rights, please use the official contact channels published on this website. If a dedicated privacy channel is created in the future, it will be disclosed on this page.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how this corporate portfolio uses cookies, browser storage, and similar technologies to keep the website functioning, remember your consent choice, and measure performance and professional traffic in a proportionate manner. Non-essential analytics are activated only after your prior consent, in line with the principles of the LGPD, GDPR, and, where applicable, the CCPA.

sections.title: 1. What cookies and similar technologies are
sections.body: Cookies are small files stored in your browser to remember preferences, support functionality, and measure usage. In addition to cookies, this website may also use browser local storage to record your consent choice and equivalent telemetry technologies compatible with the underlying infrastructure.

sections.title: 2. First-party cookies used on this website
sections.body: This website uses first-party technologies to maintain essential browsing preferences. This includes the local record of your consent choice under the key conzatti-cookie-consent and, where applicable, technical preferences of the website itself, such as language, theme, or interface state. These technologies are not intended for behavioral advertising.

sections.title: 3. Third-party cookies and identifiers
sections.body: After you accept, this website may enable Vercel Analytics for performance and stability insights and Google Analytics for measuring B2B traffic, visit sources, visited pages, and aggregated interactions. These providers may use cookies, online identifiers, or equivalent technologies to generate operational and statistical reports.

sections.title: 4. Purposes of use
sections.body: Cookies and identifiers used on this website support the following purposes: storing your consent choice, understanding reach and relevance of published content, monitoring technical performance, identifying experience improvements, and supporting aggregated analysis of commercial interest in portfolio pages and content.

sections.title: 5. Legal basis and consent-driven activation
sections.body: Strictly necessary cookies and equivalent technologies may be used to support essential preferences and record your decision. Non-essential analytics resources, including Vercel Analytics and Google Analytics, are enabled only after your explicit acceptance through the consent banner. Without that acceptance, core navigation remains available.

sections.title: 6. How to disable or withdraw consent
sections.body: You can disable analytics cookies simply by not clicking Accept in the banner. If you have already consented, you may also revoke or restrict this use by clearing website data in your browser, blocking third-party cookies in browser settings, or manually removing the local storage associated with this domain. These actions may reset saved preferences.

sections.title: 7. Data collected through analytics
sections.body: When consent is granted, analytics reports may involve data such as visited URL, language, browser, device, traffic source, time on page, page interactions, and pseudonymized technical identifiers. This website follows a data minimization approach and does not use cookies for selling personal data or for its own behavioral advertising.

sections.title: 8. Updates and contact
sections.body: This Cookie Policy may be updated to reflect legal, technical, or operational changes. The current version will remain available on this page. If you have questions about cookies, consent, or privacy, please use the contact channel provided on this website.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: A showcase of enterprise-focused solutions designed to solve business pain points. Each project highlights discovery depth, technical architecture, and business impact through ROI, OPEX efficiency, and scalable execution.
portfolio.wipSubtitle: Next solutions in validation mode - upcoming business-impact use cases.

julishub.title: JulisHub | Financial Intelligence PoC
julishub.description: Proof of Concept built to centralize financial analytics and speed up investment decisions with real-time data. Decoupled architecture (React + Python + API integrations) supports low-friction scalability for new business modules.

atendimento.title: AI Guide for Support | Enterprise Business Case
atendimento.description: Architectural solution showing how AI can scale enterprise service operations while reducing recurring operational effort. Value hypothesis targets up to 30% workload reduction in repetitive support flows.

gerador.title: AI KCS Generator | Knowledge Automation PoC
gerador.description: Automation PoC that streamlines KCS article creation and review with generative AI. Shifts a manual workflow into an assisted process, with potential to cut production time by up to 40% and accelerate onboarding readiness.

metodologias.title: Diagnostic Masters | Technical Discovery Framework
metodologias.description: Structured framework for technical discovery and troubleshooting in complex environments, connecting root-cause hypotheses to operational impact and executive prioritization for enterprise accounts.

experience.subtitle: From technical leadership to sales engineering for enterprise growth

items.description: I lead pre-sales initiatives for strategic accounts, translating complex technical scenarios into high-value commercial paths for enterprise customers.
highlights: Lead PoCs and technical discovery to validate solution fit and reduce decision risk
Design and deliver executive-level technical demonstrations focused on business outcomes
Align Sales, Product, and Services on technical-commercial strategy to accelerate deal cycles

items.description: I acted as a strategic business partner for the Support leadership team, building strong foundations in customer context analysis, executive prioritization, and value-based communication.
highlights: High-performance team leadership and development using Versatility Matrix
Stakeholder management and focal point for critical Customers and Distribution Channels
KPI management (SLA, CSAT, TMR) and audit artifact creation
Fostering innovation with AI studies to optimize diagnosis and process automation

items.description: Responsible for strategic customer relationship management (Customer Success), converting feedback and risk signals into retention, expansion, and adoption actions.
highlights: Primary point of contact, orchestrating internal teams (Development, Product)
Customer feedback analysis to identify trends
Proposing process and service improvements that impact retention and loyalty

items.description: Resolved critical and complex incidents while building the analytical discipline and deep product expertise that now support high-level technical conversations in commercial cycles.
highlights: Specialist in diagnosing technical failures with high business impact
Incident prioritization management with clear and empathetic communication
Precise documentation for Root Cause Analysis (RCA)
Technical mentorship and bridge with Product teams

items.description: I acted as the bridge between the customer's business needs and Senior's technical solution, leading implementation projects for Risk Management and Security systems.
highlights: Conducting requirements gathering sessions, translating business rules into project scope
Responsible for designing and developing integrations (WebServices SOAP/REST) and customizations
National recognition in Commercial Partnership (2018, 2021) for best performance indicators
Experience with clients across various segments (SAP, TOTVS, etc.)

items.description: Period dedicated to developing commercial and business competencies in the financial market.
highlights: Customer relationship management and prospecting (B2C)
Focus on financial planning and risk profile analysis
Presentation of strategic solutions with analytical vision
Building long-term relationships based on trust

certifications.subtitle: Technical depth, financial acumen, and commercial methodology for enterprise value selling

background.description: Former Investment Advisor at XP Investimentos, approved in the ANCORD (CVM) exam, with registration currently inactive due to compliance. This background sharpened my ability to frame risk, return, and executive-level business cases in complex buying cycles.

expertise.subtitle: How I create value in complex sales: from business pain to confident technical closure

pillars.title: Strategic Discovery & Diagnosis
pillars.description: I lead investigative meetings to map technical requirements, stakeholder dynamics, and latent business pain points behind stalled decisions.
bullets: Run structured discovery with technical depth and executive clarity
Surface process gaps, operational risk, and cost of inaction
Turn fragmented signals into clear value hypotheses and priorities

pillars.description: I design high-impact demos and PoCs for C-level and director audiences, translating features into measurable business outcomes.
bullets: Translate product capabilities into ROI, productivity, and risk reduction
Build persona-specific narratives to accelerate internal alignment
Define PoC success criteria tied to buying decisions

pillars.title: Technical-Commercial Alignment
pillars.description: I bridge executives, sales, and technical teams to reduce friction, handle objections early, and shorten enterprise sales cycles.
bullets: Bridge the gap between technical language and business priorities
Translate executive requirements into actionable product and engineering direction
Increase close predictability through continuous cross-functional alignment

contact.title: Let's *Talk?*
contact.description: I am always open to discussing how technical leadership, business strategy, and AI can transform IT operations.

blogPage.description: Content about technical sales, discovery strategy, value demonstrations, and support operations in enterprise environments. The focus is showing how technical depth becomes commercial leverage and measurable business impact.
